confidence_rationale: This is an instructional video demonstrating basic instrument handling techniques, not a scoreable FLS task performance
technique_summary: Comprehensive instructional demonstration of basic laparoscopic instrument handling fundamentals

demonstrated_techniques: proper instrument grip with thumb and ring finger placement
correct wrist positioning for instrument control
basic opening and closing of needle drivers and scissors
common_errors_addressed: improper finger placement in instrument rings
poor wrist positioning leading to reduced control
